name: Spector Cognitive Memory
description: Biologically-inspired AI memory with 4-tier cognitive architecture (Working → Episodic → Semantic → Procedural), SIMD-accelerated scoring, and sub-millisecond recall. Replaces OpenClaw's default memory with cross-session persistence, emotional valence, habituation, temporal decay, and associative recall via Hebbian/Entity/Temporal graphs.

spectorJarPath.description: Path to spector.jar. Leave empty to auto-download from GitHub Releases.

javaHome.description: Path to Java 25+ installation. Leave empty to auto-download Eclipse Temurin JDK.

dimensions.description: Vector embedding dimensions. Must match your embedding model (e.g., 768 for nomic-embed-text, 4096 for qwen3-embedding, 1536 for text-embedding-3-small).

embeddingProvider.description: Embedding provider type. 'ollama' for local Ollama server. 'openai-compatible' for any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenAI, Together, Groq, vLLM, etc.).

embeddingBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the embedding provider. For Ollama: http://localhost:11434. For OpenAI: https://api.openai.com. For custom: your endpoint URL.

embeddingModel.description: Model name for generating embeddings (e.g., nomic-embed-text, qwen3-embedding, text-embedding-3-small).

embeddingApiKey.description: API key for embedding provider (required for OpenAI-compatible providers, not needed for local Ollama).

dataDirectory.description: Directory for Spector's persistent index and memory data. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/spector/data/

capacity.description: Maximum number of memories to store.

jvmArgs.description: Additional JVM arguments for the Spector subprocess.

tagExtractor.description: How to extract synaptic tags from memories. 'content' = keyword extraction, 'llm' = LLM-powered extraction (requires Ollama), 'none' = disabled.
